__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: BET surface-area retention plus crystallinity loss for UiO-66 Zr₆O₄(OH)₄(BDC)₆ framework after 1000 h liquid-water submersion at 25 °C
predicted_unit: % BET area retention (1000 h liquid H₂O @ 25 °C)

operating_conditions.test_conditions: submerged in deionized liquid water at 25 °C, 1000 h continuous
operating_conditions.BET_method: N₂ adsorption at 77 K, BET fit 0.05 ≤ p/p₀ ≤ 0.30
operating_conditions.crystallinity_method: powder XRD, integrated peak intensity at (111) + (200) compared to as-synthesized baseline
operating_conditions.synthesis: solvothermal in DMF + HCl modulator, conventional 24 h / 120 °C protocol

model_caveat: Universal FFs predict atomistic energies / forces on the Zr₆O₄(OH)₄ cluster + BDC linker — they DO frame the hydrolytic-stability landscape (Zr-O bond hydrolysis barrier + missing-linker defect energy) reasonably for crystalline MOFs. The 88 % BET retention + 12 % crystallinity loss values here are a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: Cavka 2008 + Furukawa 2014 UiO-66 hydro-stability reports.
proxy_source: Cavka et al. 2008 J. Am. Chem. Soc. 130:13850 (UiO-66 first report, Zr-cluster water-stability anchor); Furukawa et al. 2014 IUCrJ 1:252 (UiO-66 BET + crystallinity after extended aqueous-phase tests, ~85-90 % retention at 1000 h); DeCoste et al. 2013 J. Mater. Chem. A 1:11922 (UiO-66 stability under water + acid + base conditions); Wang & Yaghi review 2020 Chem. Rev. 120:8479 (MOF aqueous-stability survey, UiO-66 high-stability class)
falsifier_text: BET area retention < 80% OR crystallinity loss > 20% after 1000 h H₂O @ 25 °C → FAIL
unproven_markers_preserved: UiO-66 water stability claim depends on Zr₆-cluster defect density — missing-linker defects degrade hydro-stability HARD_WALL (preserved per `mof/mof.md` MOF-L12)
surfactant-templated UiO-66 scale-up > kg UNVERIFIED at commercial production
magic-MOF DAC $100/t UNPROVEN preserved verbatim — Climeworks amine baseline $600-1000/t per `mof/mof.md`
long-duration (> 10⁴ h) liquid-water + thermal-cycling aging UNVERIFIED beyond academic test corpus
trace-impurity-driven Zr-cluster degradation (Cl⁻, SO₄²⁻ at industrial water quality) UNVERIFIED at production
honesty_caveats: Both falsifier branches PASS at the proxy literature values for academic-grade UiO-66 (low defect density, < 1 missing linker per Zr₆ cluster). PASS does NOT close the candidate — defect-density HARD_WALL on hydrostability remains; long-duration > 10⁴ h aqueous aging UNVERIFIED. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per ACS / IUCr publisher terms; NuMat Technologies / Promethean Particles MOF synthesis vendor authority (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
